title: A Clue in the Crowd
description: Mixing, selling, and debunking records all point toward a single pair. Deduce what potion they produce.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing6 and ing8, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing6=R- (ing6 has R-), ing8=R+ (ing8 has R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing6=G+ (ing6 has G+), ing8=G- (ing8 has G-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing6=B+ (ing6 has B+), ing8=B+ (ing8 has B+)
      → SAME sign + → B+ resolves.
